rationale.R1.3: The agent identifies that the central claim about robustness isn't fully supported by experiments, as no varying conditions were tested beyond the default split.
rationale.RX.1: The agent points out the lack of uncertainty measures like standard deviations and statistical significance testing.
rationale.RX.3: The review stays within the scope of methodological gaps and suggestions relevant to the experimental section.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or errors are introduced; the critique is constructive.
rationale.RX.5: Suggestions and claims lack specific sources, reducing traceability.
